query:
-- Senyo's daily log for day 12
SELECT id, participantId, dayNumber, dayComplete, noAlcohol, cleanEating, exercise, dailyReflection, readAndTeach, trackEverything, bonusRule, createdAt, updatedAt FROM daily_logs WHERE participantId = 90001 AND dayNumber = 12;
